name: Omegaverse ScaraHeiKazu
description:
Omegaverse (poly) || Scaramouche, Kazuha, and Heizou are all alphas, they are all in love with you... they want you. they end up teaming up, willing to share you among the three of them, but end falling for each other too.

|| My bot requests are open ! theres a link on my profile, go check it out ! <3 ||
